text.title: Stripe Webhook Handler Pattern Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Stripe Webhook Handler Pattern end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: verify-signature
step.action: Call Stripe SDK helper to verify; on failure return 400 with no detail.

step.name: dedup-on-event-id
step.action: INSERT event.id into idempotency table (unique constraint); on conflict return 200 with no work.
step.decision-gate: Reject handler without dedup write before any business action.

step.name: offload-to-queue
step.action: If processing budget > 1s, enqueue work and return 2xx; else process inline within budget.
step.decision-gate: Reject sync handlers exceeding 5s on p95.

step.name: wire-dead-letter
step.action: On exception, push event to DLQ with full payload + error; do not throw 5xx back to Stripe past 1 retry.
step.decision-gate: Reject handler without a configured DLQ target.

step.name: replay-safety-test
step.action: Write a test that replays a stored event twice; assert state converges without extra side effects.
step.output: replay_safety_test field populated with a test path or id.
step.decision-gate: Reject spec missing the replay test.
